meaning: n.吉夫斯(美国作家P.G.Wodehouse所著小说中人物,现用来指理想的男仆)
examples: At this point, I realized I needed a real-life Jeeves.
"Jeeves, take off my stockings and garter." he silently obeys her.
If the idea is to help people search the Internet better, you might aswell use Ask Jeeves.
Bryan Jeeves insists his group was only a trustee holding shares for Bancroft's true owners.
Even without Jeeves, Ask.com can still take you anywhere on the net you need to go.
